title: Anthropic wins injunction against Trump administration over Defense Department saga
summary: A federal judge has ordered that the Trump administration rescind recent restrictions it placed on the AI company.
title_es: Anthropic gana injunción contra restricciones del Pentágono
bajada: Un juez ordenó al gobierno de Trump rescindir las restricciones impuestas a Anthropic. Esta victoria judicial preliminar permite a la empresa continuar sus operaciones mientras se resuelve el caso.
bajada_en: A judge ordered the Trump administration to rescind restrictions on Anthropic. This preliminary judicial victory allows the company to continue operations while the lawsuit proceeds.

title: Apple will reportedly allow other AI chatbots to plug into Siri
summary: Apple's iOS 27 update will allow users to choose the AI chatbot they want to link with Siri. That's according to a report from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, who says third-party chatbots downloaded from the App Store, like Google's Gemini or Anthropic's Claude, will be able to fetch replies for Siri - similar to how the […]
title_es: Apple permitirá otros chatbots en Siri con iOS 27
bajada: Según Bloomberg, iOS 27 permitirá a usuarios elegir qué chatbot IA conectar con Siri. Esto permite que Gemini, Claude y otras plataformas compitan por integrarse en el ecosistema de Apple.
bajada_en: According to Bloomberg, iOS 27 will allow users to choose which AI chatbot to link with Siri. This enables Gemini, Claude, and other platforms to compete for integration in Apple's ecosystem.

title: ARC-AGI-3: A New Challenge for Frontier Agentic Intelligence
summary:
arXiv:2603.24621v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We introduce ARC-AGI-3, an interactive benchmark for studying agentic intelligence through novel, abstract, turn-based environments in which agents must explore, infer goals, build internal models of environment dynamics, and plan effective action sequences without explicit instructions. Like its predecessors ARC-AGI-1 and 2, ARC-AGI-3 focuses entirely on evaluating fluid adaptive efficiency on novel tasks, while avoiding language and external knowledge. ARC-AGI-3 environments only leverage Core Knowledge priors and are difficulty-calibrated via extensive testing with human test-takers. Our testing shows humans can solve 100% of the environments, in contrast to frontier AI systems which, as of March 2026, score below 1%. In this paper, we present the benchmark design, its efficiency-based scoring framework grounded in human action baselines, and the methodology used to construct, validate, and calibrate the environments.
title_es: ARC-AGI-3: nuevo benchmark para IA agéntica
bajada: Presentan ARC-AGI-3, un benchmark interactivo para evaluar inteligencia agéntica en entornos novedosos. Los sistemas frontales logran menos del 1% de éxito mientras humanos alcanzan 100%.
bajada_en: Researchers introduce ARC-AGI-3, an interactive benchmark for evaluating agentic intelligence in novel environments. Frontier AI systems achieve less than 1% success while humans reach 100%.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
summary: The Gemini emblem sits next to text reading 'Gemini 3.1 Flash Live'. The background has blue, multicolored dots making up a microphone icon
title_es: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: audio de IA más natural
bajada: Google lanza Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, mejorando la capacidad de procesamiento de audio en tiempo real. Esta actualización busca hacer más naturales y confiables las interacciones de voz con IA.
bajada_en: Google launches Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, improving real-time audio processing capabilities. This update aims to make voice interactions with AI more natural and reliable.

title: Judge sides with Anthropic to temporarily block the Pentagon’s ban
summary: After Anthropic's weeks-long standoff with the Pentagon, the company won one milestone: A judge granted Anthropic a preliminary injunction in its lawsuit, which sought to reverse its government blacklisting while the judicial process plays out. "The Department of War's records show that it designated Anthropic as a supply chain risk because of its 'hostile manner […]
title_es: Tribunal bloquea temporalmente la prohibición del Pentágono a Anthropic
bajada: Un juez concedió una injunción preliminar a Anthropic en su demanda contra el Pentágono. La decisión representa un hito importante en el conflicto entre la empresa y el gobierno estadounidense.
bajada_en: A judge granted Anthropic a preliminary injunction in its lawsuit against the Pentagon. The decision represents a significant milestone in the company's dispute with the U.S. government.

title: You can now transfer your chats and personal information from other chatbots directly into Gemini
summary: Google is launching "switching tools" that, just as it sounds, will make it easier for users of other chatbots to switch to Gemini.
title_es: Gemini permite transferir chats desde otros chatbots
bajada: Google lanza herramientas de migración que facilitan a usuarios trasladar sus conversaciones y datos personales desde otros chatbots a Gemini. Esta estrategia busca captar usuarios de competidores.
bajada_en: Google launches migration tools to help users easily transfer conversations and personal data from other chatbots to Gemini. This strategy aims to attract users from competitors.

title: Anthropic Supply-Chain-Risk Designation Halted by Judge
summary: A judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration’s designation, clearing the way for Anthropic to keep doing business without the label starting next week.
title_es: Juez bloquea designación de riesgo de Anthropic
bajada: Un tribunal bloqueó temporalmente la designación de 'riesgo de cadena de suministro' que el gobierno Trump impuso a Anthropic. La decisión permite que la empresa continúe operando sin restricciones.
bajada_en: A court temporarily blocked the Trump administration's 'supply chain risk' designation against Anthropic. The decision allows the company to continue operating without restrictions.

title: $500 GPU outperforms Claude Sonnet on coding benchmarks
title_es: GPU de $500 supera a Claude Sonnet en coding
bajada: Un modelo en GPU local de bajo costo demuestra mejor rendimiento que Claude Sonnet en benchmarks de programación. El hallazgo sugiere que modelos optimizados locales pueden ser competitivos.
bajada_en: A low-cost local GPU model outperforms Claude Sonnet on coding benchmarks. The finding suggests that optimized local models can be competitive.

title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
title_es: Google Translate Live llega a iOS con traducción en auriculares
bajada: Google expande su herramienta de traducción en vivo a iOS, permitiendo traducción en tiempo real directamente en auriculares. La función ahora está disponible en más países para iOS y Android.
bajada_en: Google expands Live Translate to iOS, enabling real-time translation directly through headphones. The feature is now available in more countries for both iOS and Android.

title: Search Live is expanding globally
summary: A graphic with the words Search Live shown underneath a waveform icon. To the right, a phone shows the Google app with Search Live open. The camera is pointing at trees in a forest.
title_es: Google Search Live se expande globalmente
bajada: Google expande su herramienta Search Live a más países. Esta característica mejora búsquedas en tiempo real con capacidades visuales.
bajada_en: Google expands Search Live to more countries. This feature enhances real-time search with visual capabilities.

title: Google is making it easier to import another AI’s memory into Gemini
summary: After Anthropic updated its tool for copying another AI's memory into Claude earlier this month, Google Gemini is rolling out new "Import Memory" and "Import Chat History" features on desktop that can help users quickly copy over everything their current AI already knows about them. To use the "Import Memory" tool, users copy and paste […]
title_es: Gemini facilita importar memoria de otras IAs
bajada: Google Gemini introduce herramientas para importar memoria y historial de chat de otros modelos IA. Esto simplifica la migración de datos entre plataformas para desarrolladores y usuarios.
bajada_en: Google Gemini introduces tools to import memory and chat history from other AI models. This simplifies data migration between platforms for developers and users.

title: Show HN: I put an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as its transport layer
summary: The stack: two agents on separate boxes. The public one (nullclaw) is a 678 KB Zig binary using ~1 MB RAM, connected to an Ergo IRC server. Visitors talk to it via a gamja web client embedded in my site. The private one (ironclaw) handles email and scheduling, reachable only over Tailscale via Google's A2A protocol.Tiered inference: Haiku 4.5 for conversation (sub-second, cheap), Sonnet 4.6 for tool use (only when needed). Hard cap at $2/day.A2A passthrough: the private-side agent borrows the gateway's own inference pipeline, so there's one API key and one billing relationship regardless of who initiated the request.You can talk to nully athttps://georgelarson.me/chat/or connect with any IRC client to irc.georgelarson.me:6697 (TLS), channel #lobby.Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47536761Points: 280# Comments: 78
title_es: Agente IA en un VPS de $7/mes con IRC
bajada: Un developer logró desplegar un agente IA en una máquina virtual ultra-económica usando IRC como protocolo de transporte. El proyecto demuestra arquitecturas eficientes con costos de inferencia controlados.
bajada_en: A developer deployed an AI agent on a $7/month VPS using IRC as transport protocol. The project demonstrates efficient architectures with controlled inference costs.

title: We rewrote JSONata with AI in a day, saved $500k/year
title_es: Empresa reescribe JSONata con IA y ahorra $500k anuales
bajada: Reco.ai reescribió una librería compleja usando IA en un solo día, logrando ahorros significativos en costos operativos. El caso muestra el impacto real de IA en optimización de código.
bajada_en: Reco.ai rewrote a complex library using AI in a single day, achieving significant operational cost savings. The case demonstrates the real-world impact of AI on code optimization.

title: [P] Deezer showed CNN detection fails on compressed audio, here's a dual-engine approach that survives MP3
summary: I've been working on detecting AI-generated music and ran into the same wall that Deezer's team documented in their paper, CNN-based detection on mel-spectrograms breaks when audio is compressed to MP3.The problem:A ResNet18 trained on mel-spectrograms works well on WAV files, but real-world music is distributed as MP3/AAC. Compression destroys the subtle spectral artifacts the CNN relies on.What actually worked:Instead of trying to make the CNN more robust, I added a second engine based on source separation (Demucs). The idea is simple:Separate a track into 4 stems (vocals, drums, bass, other)Re-mix them back togetherMeasure the difference between original and reconstructed audioFor human-recorded music, stems bleed into each other during recording (room acoustics, mic crosstalk, etc.), so separation + reconstruction produces noticeable differences. For AI music, each stem is synthesized independently separation and reconstruction yield nearly identical results.Results:Human false positive rate: ~1.1%AI detection rate: 80%+Works regardless of audio codec (MP3, AAC, OGG)The CNN handles the easy cases (high-confidence predictions), and the reconstruction engine only kicks in when CNN is uncertain. This saves compute since source separation is expensive.Limitations:Detection rate varies across different AI generatorsDemucs is non-deterministic borderline cases can flip between runsOnly tested on music, not speech or sound effectsCurious if anyone has explored similar hybrid approaches, or has ideas for making the reconstruction analysis more robust.submitted by/u/Leather_Lobster_2558[link][comments]
title_es: Detección de música IA mejorada con dual-engine
bajada: Un researcher combina CNN con separación de fuentes para detectar música generada por IA incluso en archivos MP3 comprimidos. El enfoque dual logra >80% de precisión sin falsos positivos.
bajada_en: A researcher combines CNNs with source separation to detect AI-generated music even in compressed MP3 files. The dual-engine approach achieves >80% accuracy with minimal false positives.

title: Glm 5.1 is out
bajada: Se lanza GLM 5.1, una nueva versión del modelo de lenguaje open-source. Esta actualización continúa el desarrollo de alternativas open-source en el ecosistema local.
bajada_en: GLM 5.1 launches, a new version of the open-source language model. This update continues the development of open-source alternatives in the local ecosystem.
